contextBlurb: Maryland has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 1 relates to moratoriums or prohibitions. 1 offers incentives or exemptions.

legislation.title: Law Enforcement - Use of Facial Recognition Technology - Images Captured in Dwelling Interior
legislation.summary: Authorizing the use of facial recognition technology by law enforcement to investigate the commission or attempted commission of certain crimes if the image used by facial recognition technology was captured in the interior of a dwelling.
